title: ntlmrelayx NTLM Relay Execution Indicators
description: Detects execution of impacket ntlmrelayx, used to relay coerced NTLM authentication to LDAP/SMB/HTTP targets for RBCD, ADCS ESC8, or remote code execution. GOAD's NTLM relay scenario relays a coerced hash to a target host.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*ntlmrelayx*' or 'Command Line' like '*ntlmrelayx.py*')) or ( (('Command Line' like '*-smb2support*' or 'Command Line' like '*--delegate-access*' or 'Command Line' like '*-socks*' or 'Command Line' like '*--escalate-user*')) and (('Command Line' like '*ntlmrelayx*' or 'Command Line' like '*ntlmrelayx.py*')) ))
